judgment.summary: Micron exhibits exceptionally strong growth and profitability, trading at a very low forward P/E despite high current multiples.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus by 33.2%; next earnings date is 2026-06-24.
positives: Revenue growth 196.3% YoY and earnings growth 756.0% YoY indicate explosive expansion.
Profit margin 41.5% and operating margin 67.6% are exceptionally high.
Forward P/E of 7.12x is extremely attractive relative to trailing P/E of 34.61x and PEG of 0.23.
Strong analyst consensus of 'strong_buy' with a high target price suggests significant upside potential.
Last quarter's EPS beat of 33.2% demonstrates strong recent performance.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 14.90 is high, though offset by strong cash flow.
Beta of 1.92 indicates higher volatility than the broader market.
Dividend yield is very low at 0.1%.

news.paragraph: Micron Technology (MU) is highlighted in analyst reports amidst a broader chip rally, though recent headlines suggest the sector's momentum may be shifting towards Nvidia. The company recently reported a significant earnings beat for its last quarter, exceeding estimates by over 33%. With the next earnings date set for June 24th, investors will be watching to see if MU can maintain its impressive growth trajectory.

headlines.title: The Furious Chip Rally Was Petering Out. Now Wall Street Turns to Nvidia.

examples.body: $MU 2023 NVDA, I know I was there. This the closest thing to what NVDA used to be 📈

$MU people selling for 2 percent gains. Come one stick around for the big money
